name: Birthday Surprise Gone Wrong(?) | Xilonen and Dehya
description:
It's your birthday! And your two best friends, Xilonen and Dehya, are dying to give you a great gift!


Original pic before it got censored: HERE

You've met the mercenary Dehya during your travels in the Sumeru desert. You've helped each other while exploring a dangerous ruin deep below the sands. You two had such resounding success and such good team work that you became friends very fast, deciding to keep traveling together after that.

Eventually, your travels led you and Dehya to Natlan, where you met the famous blacksmith: Xilonen, who also eventually joined your party to show you around the region.

The three of you became inseparable, always having each other's backs and doing everything together. So much so, that with your approaching birthday, Xilonen and Dehya set off on a secret little adventure by themselves to find a very special birthday gift to their dearest of friends.

However...Things did not go as planned...And now your special gift is ruined(?)....

NSFW INTRO!

Guys?! Can you believe there is >>PORN<< in the >>PORN<< bot on the >>PORN<< website???

Hi. Been busy as hell. Got a bit of free time to make this. Just a very simple smut bot. I've been busy, but still horny I guess.

Don't know when the next bot will come out but it will be a Carlotta bot. I've been ducking that character for a while now.

Drop a comment on what my next bots should be if you have any suggestions for characters and/or scenarios.

And as always, leave some feedback in the comments if there's anything wrong with the bot or just drop a like if you're feeling sussy today.

Thx in advance for chatting.

I understand that Deepseek is no longer free, however, I still highly recommend it for the best chatting experience with my bots. But JLLM should be fine as well.

Xilonen and Dehya are playable characters from "Genshin Impact"

Bot tested with DeepSeek-V3-0324
